requirement_topic.en: EMC — Bare Induction Motor (no integrated electronics)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——纯感应电机（无集成电子装置）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——純感應電機（無集成電子裝置）

summary.en: Morocco aligns its EMC regulatory framework with IEC and EN standards through IMANOR NM adoptions. ANRT (Agence Nationale de Réglementation des Télécommunications) regulates radio and telecommunications equipment EMC in Morocco; for industrial motors without integrated electronics or radio, ANRT scope generally does not apply. A bare mains-fed induction motor with no integrated electronic control is considered a passive apparatus; dedicated mandatory Moroccan EMC certification for such motors is not established as of the verified date. Where a CE DoC is presented under the Morocco-EU Advanced Status acceptance, the EMC assessment performed for EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU is considered supportive evidence. If the motor includes integrated VFD electronics, importers should confirm current ANRT or IMANOR EMC requirements.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥通过IMANOR采纳IEC和EN标准，将其EMC监管框架与之协调。ANRT（国家电信监管局）负责摩洛哥无线电及电信设备的EMC监管；对于无集成电子装置或无线电模块的工业电动机，ANRT的监管范围通常不适用。不含集成电子控制器的纯干线馈电感应电机被视为被动设备；截至核实日期，摩洛哥尚未为此类电机建立专项强制EMC认证。在摩洛哥-欧盟高级地位接受框架下提交CE符合性声明时，为符合欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU而进行的EMC评估可作为支持性证据。若电机包含集成变频器电子装置，进口商应向ANRT或IMANOR确认当前EMC要求。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥通過IMANOR採納IEC和EN標準，將其EMC監管框架與之協調。ANRT（國家電信監管局）負責摩洛哥無線電及電信設備的EMC監管；對於無集成電子裝置或無線電模組的工業電動機，ANRT的監管範圍通常不適用。不含集成電子控制器的純幹線饋電感應電機被視為被動設備；截至核實日期，摩洛哥尚未為此類電機建立專項強制EMC認證。在摩洛哥-歐盟高級地位接受框架下提交CE符合性聲明時，為符合歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU而進行的EMC評估可作為支持性證據。若電機包含集成變頻器電子裝置，進口商應向ANRT或IMANOR確認當前EMC要求。

standards_or_laws: NM IEC/CISPR standards (IMANOR adoptions for EMC)
ANRT — Agence Nationale de Reglementation des Telecommunications (radio/telecom EMC regulator)
IEC 61800-3 (adjustable speed drive systems EMC, referenced via NM adoption)

summary.en: China does not impose a dedicated mandatory EMC standard on bare induction motors. For variable-speed drive systems, GB/T 12668.3-2012 (equivalent to IEC 61800-3:2004) governs EMC requirements as a recommended (GB/T) standard. CCC does not specifically require EMC certification for most industrial motor-drive configurations. Neither CCC nor Chinese EMC test reports are recognised for Moroccan market access purposes.
summary.zh: 中国对纯感应电机没有专项强制性EMC标准。对于变速驱动系统，GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004）作为推荐性（GB/T）标准规定了EMC要求。CCC对大多数工业电机驱动配置通常不强制要求EMC认证。CCC及中国EMC测试报告均不被用于摩洛哥市场准入。
summary.zht: 中國對純感應電機沒有專項強制性EMC標準。對於變速驅動系統，GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004）作為推薦性（GB/T）標準規定了EMC要求。CCC對大多數工業電機驅動配置通常不強制要求EMC認證。CCC及中國EMC測試報告均不被用於摩洛哥市場准入。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 12668.3-2012 (equiv. IEC 61800-3:2004) — recommended standard, not mandatory for most configurations

gap.en: For a bare passive induction motor exported to Morocco, no mandatory Moroccan EMC certification is established as of the verified date; the scope position should be documented. CE DoC covering EMC (where the EU EMC Directive applies, e.g. for motor+VFD systems) is accepted via Morocco-EU Advanced Status. Chinese CCC EMC records have no recognised pathway in Morocco. If the motor includes integrated drive electronics, ANRT or IMANOR confirmation is required.
gap.zh: 截至核实日期，对于出口摩洛哥的纯被动感应电机，尚无强制性摩洛哥EMC认证要求；应记录适用范围判断。涵盖EMC（适用于摩洛哥-欧盟高级地位接受框架下欧盟EMC指令适用场景，如电机+变频器系统）的CE符合性声明可被接受。中国CCC EMC记录在摩洛哥没有被认可的路径。若电机包含集成驱动电子装置，须向ANRT或IMANOR确认。
gap.zht: 截至核實日期，對於出口摩洛哥的純被動感應電機，尚無強制性摩洛哥EMC認證要求；應記錄適用範圍判斷。涵蓋EMC（適用於摩洛哥-歐盟高級地位接受框架下歐盟EMC指令適用場景，如電機+變頻器系統）的CE符合性聲明可被接受。中國CCC EMC記錄在摩洛哥沒有被認可的路徑。若電機包含集成驅動電子裝置，須向ANRT或IMANOR確認。

mandatory_status.target: No mandatory Moroccan EMC certification confirmed for bare passive industrial motors as of verified date; ANRT scope applies to radio/telecom equipment; verify current requirements for motor+VFD systems
mandatory_status.cn: No mandatory EMC certification for bare motors; GB/T 12668.3 is recommended only for drive systems

source.publisher: ANRT — Agence Nationale de Reglementation des Telecommunications (Morocco)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For a bare induction motor exported to Morocco, no dedicated mandatory EMC certification is confirmed as of 2026-06-17; document the scope position. For motor+VFD systems, CE DoC covering EMC Directive 2014/30/EU is accepted via Advanced Status. Chinese CCC EMC records have no recognised pathway in Morocco. Confirm current ANRT/IMANOR requirements with qualified Moroccan professionals before shipment. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年6月17日，对于出口摩洛哥的纯感应电机，尚无确认的专项强制EMC认证要求；应记录适用范围判断。对于电机+变频器系统，涵盖EMC指令2014/30/EU的CE符合性声明可通过高级地位接受。中国CCC EMC记录在摩洛哥没有被认可的路径。出货前应向摩洛哥合格专业人士确认ANRT/IMANOR当前要求。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年6月17日，對於出口摩洛哥的純感應電機，尚無確認的專項強制EMC認證要求；應記錄適用範圍判斷。對於電機+變頻器系統，涵蓋EMC指令2014/30/EU的CE符合性聲明可通過高級地位接受。中國CCC EMC記錄在摩洛哥沒有被認可的路徑。出貨前應向摩洛哥合格專業人士確認ANRT/IMANOR當前要求。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Motor with Integrated VFD / Drive System
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——集成变频器的电机/驱动系统
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——集成變頻器的電機/驅動系統

summary.en: When an industrial motor is combined with a variable-frequency drive (VFD), frequency inverter, or other power electronics, the combined system generates significant EMC emissions. In Morocco, ANRT regulates radio interference and EMC for apparatus that may affect telecommunications. For drive-integrated systems, IMANOR NM adoptions of IEC 61800-3 apply as the relevant EMC standard reference. CE DoC covering EMC Directive 2014/30/EU compliance with EN IEC 61800-3 is accepted in Morocco via Advanced Status. Importers should confirm with ANRT and IMANOR whether a local notification or registration is required for drive systems sold in Morocco.
summary.zh: 当工业电动机与变频器（VFD）、逆变器或其他电力电子装置组合时，该组合系统会产生显著的EMC干扰。在摩洛哥，ANRT负责监管可能影响电信的设备的无线电干扰和EMC。对于集成驱动系统，IMANOR对IEC 61800-3的NM采纳标准是相关EMC标准参考。涵盖符合EN IEC 61800-3的EMC指令2014/30/EU合规性的CE符合性声明，通过高级地位在摩洛哥被接受。进口商应向ANRT和IMANOR确认在摩洛哥销售的驱动系统是否需要当地通报或注册。
summary.zht: 當工業電動機與變頻器（VFD）、逆變器或其他電力電子裝置組合時，該組合系統會產生顯著的EMC干擾。在摩洛哥，ANRT負責監管可能影響電信的設備的無線電干擾和EMC。對於集成驅動系統，IMANOR對IEC 61800-3的NM採納標準是相關EMC標準參考。涵蓋符合EN IEC 61800-3的EMC指令2014/30/EU合規性的CE符合性聲明，通過高級地位在摩洛哥被接受。進口商應向ANRT和IMANOR確認在摩洛哥銷售的驅動系統是否需要當地通報或登記。

standards_or_laws: NM IEC 61800-3 (IMANOR adoption — EMC for adjustable speed drive systems)
ANRT regulations (radio interference and EMC for apparatus affecting telecommunications)
IEC 61800-3:2022 / EN IEC 61800-3:2023 (current edition referenced via CE DoC acceptance)

summary.en: China's GB/T 12668.3-2012 (equiv. IEC 61800-3:2004) is a recommended standard covering EMC for adjustable-speed power drive systems. It is not mandatory for most industrial configurations. CCC does not specifically mandate EMC testing for most industrial motor+drive combinations. The Chinese standard is two IEC editions behind the current IEC 61800-3:2022 / EN IEC 61800-3:2023 referenced in the EU CE DoC acceptance pathway.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004）是涵盖变速电力传动系统EMC的推荐性标准。对大多数工业配置而言不具强制性。CCC对大多数工业电机+驱动器组合通常不强制要求EMC测试。该中国标准较CE符合性声明接受路径中参考的当前IEC 61800-3:2022 / EN IEC 61800-3:2023落后两个IEC版本。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004）是涵蓋變速電力傳動系統EMC的推薦性標準。對大多數工業配置而言不具強制性。CCC對大多數工業電機+驅動器組合通常不強制要求EMC測試。該中國標準較CE符合性聲明接受路徑中參考的當前IEC 61800-3:2022 / EN IEC 61800-3:2023落後兩個IEC版本。

gap.en: Chinese motor+VFD systems with only GB/T 12668.3 test records have no direct recognised EMC pathway for Morocco. CE DoC covering EMC Directive 2014/30/EU (supported by EN IEC 61800-3 test evidence) is the accepted route via Advanced Status. Chinese exporters without CE marking must either obtain CE for EU/Morocco access or pursue IMANOR/ANRT-specific conformity. The version gap (IEC 61800-3:2004 vs 2022) also means Chinese test reports may not cover current EMC standard requirements.
gap.zh: 仅持有GB/T 12668.3测试记录的中国电机+变频器系统，在摩洛哥没有直接被认可的EMC路径。涵盖EMC指令2014/30/EU（由EN IEC 61800-3测试证据支持）的CE符合性声明是通过高级地位被接受的路径。不持有CE标志的中国出口商须为欧盟/摩洛哥市场准入获取CE标志，或寻求IMANOR/ANRT专项合格评定。版本差异（IEC 61800-3:2004 vs 2022）也意味着中国测试报告可能未涵盖当前EMC标准要求。
gap.zht: 僅持有GB/T 12668.3測試記錄的中國電機+變頻器系統，在摩洛哥沒有直接被認可的EMC路徑。涵蓋EMC指令2014/30/EU（由EN IEC 61800-3測試證據支持）的CE符合性聲明是通過高級地位被接受的路徑。不持有CE標誌的中國出口商須為歐盟/摩洛哥市場准入獲取CE標誌，或尋求IMANOR/ANRT專項合格評定。版本差異（IEC 61800-3:2004 vs 2022）也意味著中國測試報告可能未涵蓋當前EMC標準要求。

mandatory_status.target: ANRT and IMANOR apply to drive-integrated systems; CE DoC accepted via Advanced Status; local notification/registration requirements should be confirmed with ANRT
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T) only — GB/T 12668.3 compliance is voluntary; not a recognised route for Morocco

source.publisher: ANRT — Agence Nationale de Reglementation des Telecommunications (Morocco)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Motor+VFD systems exported to Morocco: CE DoC covering EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU (with EN IEC 61800-3 test evidence) is the accepted conformity pathway via Advanced Status. Chinese GB/T 12668.3 records alone are not a recognised route. Importers should confirm ANRT notification requirements for drive systems. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出口摩洛哥的电机+变频器系统：涵盖欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU（含EN IEC 61800-3测试证据）的CE符合性声明是通过高级地位被接受的合规路径。仅凭中国GB/T 12668.3记录不是被认可的路径。进口商应向ANRT确认驱动系统的通报要求。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出口摩洛哥的電機+變頻器系統：涵蓋歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU（含EN IEC 61800-3測試證據）的CE符合性聲明是通過高級地位被接受的合規路徑。僅憑中國GB/T 12668.3記錄不是被認可的路徑。進口商應向ANRT確認驅動系統的通報要求。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
